arts.ttl: Wolves vs Aston Villa LIVE match updates and team news from Molineux
arts.sum: They drew 1-1 to West Ham in the league last weekend which followed strong results against Everton and Arsenal away from home earlier this month. They are winless in their past six league games following Champions League fixtures, with three home draws and three away defeats.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa close on deal to loan Marcus Rashford from Manchester United
arts.sum: Unai Emery driving more for out-of-favour forward Villa discussing including option to buy Rashford Aston Villa are close to agreeing a deal to sign Marcus Rashford on loan for the rest of the season, with Unai Emery driving the move to sign the out-of-favour Manchester United forward. Villa have been exploring the market in that position after the departure of Jhon Durán, with Matheus Cunha, João Félix, Marco Asensio and Mathys Tel among the options considered. Villa regard Rashford as a low-risk signing given they are unlikely to pay a fee. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Marco Asensio set for Aston Villa loan as PSG part ways with Cher Ndour
arts.sum: Aston Villa are leading the race to sign PSG striker Marco Asensio (29) on loan, according to L’Equipe and Foot Mercato. To ratify the Spaniard’s loan to the Villains, Les…

arts.ttl: Aston Villa close in on Marcus Rashford loan move
arts.sum: The 27-year-old has been frozen out at Old Trafford under new boss Ruben Amorim.

arts.ttl: Report: Marcus Rashford has said yes to Aston Villa for two reasons
arts.sum: TBR Football understands that Marcus Rashford is open to a move to join Aston Villa on loan and Unai Emery’s side are now progressing in...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa handed Marcus Rashford transfer response after Man United bombshell dropped
arts.sum: Talks are progressing for Rashford to join Villa on loan for the remainder of the season as they look to rebuild their team following Jhon Duran's big-money move to Al-Nassr. Manchester United's Marcus Rashford is reportedly on the verge of a loan transfer to Aston Villa .

arts.ttl: Aston Villa closing on sensational Marcus Rashford loan deal
arts.sum: Aston Villa look likely to end Marcus Rashford's Manchester United hell by agreeing a loan deal until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Arsenal get new Ollie Watkins hope as Aston Villa deal ‘CLOSE’
arts.sum: Arsenal ’s hopes of signing Aston Villa striker Ollie Watkins have had new life breathed into them. Arsenal get new Ollie Watkins hope as Aston Villa deal ‘CLOSE’

arts.ttl: Watkins has told me he wants to stay at Villa - Emery
arts.sum: Striker Ollie Watkins tells boss Unai Emery he wants to stay at Aston Villa and reject interest from Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Duran completes £71m Saudi move from Aston Villa
arts.sum: Striker Jhon Duran joins Saudi Pro League side Al-Nassr from Aston Villa in a deal worth up to £71m.
